# Ferdy

> Social media automation for venues in Australia and New Zealand.

Ferdy automates the creation and publishing of your repeatable, predictable posts on Facebook and Instagram. It is built for venues — hospitality, accommodation, events, workspaces, family entertainment, attractions, arts and culture, and fitness and wellness.

## How It Works

1. A free Strategy & Setup session with a Ferdy strategist defines your post categories (weekly programme, monthly themes, upcoming events) and loads in your approved media library.
2. Ferdy generates posts from your venue details and rotates through your approved media on the cadence you choose — weekly, monthly, or as event countdowns.
3. You review, edit, approve, or skip each draft before it goes live. Nothing publishes without your sign-off.

## Who It Is For

Ferdy is built for venues with a regular programme, including:

- Hospitality & Dining — restaurants, cafés, bars, pubs, breweries, distilleries, wineries, cellar doors
- Accommodation — hotels, motels, lodges, holiday parks, B&Bs, resorts, retreats
- Events & Functions — wedding venues, function centres, conference, convention & exhibition halls
- Workspace & Business — co-working spaces, serviced offices, meeting & training rooms
- Family Entertainment Centres — mini golf, escape rooms, bowling, climbing, go karts, arcades
- Attractions & Experiences — zoos, aquariums, botanic gardens, theme parks, heritage sites, zip wires, bungee
- Arts & Culture — theatres, performing arts centres, cinemas, museums, galleries
- Fitness & Wellness — gyms, health clubs, pilates & yoga studios, day spas

## Pricing

- Solo plan: NZ$147 per month (+GST) per brand, includes up to 30 automated posts per month
- Multi plan: Custom pricing for groups or agencies managing multiple venues (book a call)

## Key Features

- Automated post creation from venue details and approved media library
- AI-generated copy matched to your venue's tone of voice
- Scheduled publishing to Facebook (Page posts) and Instagram (Feed and Stories)
- Weekly recurring posts, monthly themed posts, and event countdown posts
- Auto-rotation through your media library so posts always look fresh
- Full editorial control: review, edit, approve, or skip every post
- Multi-brand management for groups and agencies
- Team collaboration with role-based access

## Interactive Demo

Visit https://ferdy.io/demo to drop in your URL and see what Ferdy would post for your venue. Takes about 2 minutes.
